================================================
FILE: README.md
================================================
# Repo
Provides an MCP server and tool registration.

================================================
FILE: pyproject.toml
================================================
[project]
name = "repo"

================================================
FILE: src/server.py
================================================
class Server:
    def register_tool(self, name):
        return name
